title: rubus flagellaris var. humifusus
intro: Rubus flagellaris var. humifusus, also known as low-lying black raspberry, is a variant of the black raspberry plant, characterized by its spreading habit and low-growing nature. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus flagellaris var. humifusus include its potential to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular and immune system health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and provide various health benefits.
